automation_scope: Safe to automate for reservation FAQs and policy explanations when property facts are stable and known.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Answer the guest's policy or informational question directly, use current property facts only, and invite follow-up if the guest needs more detail.

automation_scope: Safe to automate for receipt, folio, invoice, and statement requests after verifying stay details.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Thank the sender, confirm the requested billing document will be retrieved, ask for missing stay details if needed, and give a conservative follow-up window.

automation_scope: Use AI for acknowledgement and review language only. Billing disputes and refund outcomes require review.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Acknowledge the concern, state the billing team will review the details, and avoid promising a refund, correction, or resolution timeline without verification.

automation_scope: Good for guest-facing drafting on reservation changes, room requests, and exceptions. Review is recommended before send.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Acknowledge the request, explain any availability or policy limits, use subject-to-availability language, and give the next step without guaranteeing special requests.

automation_scope: Auto-acknowledge or route only. Business evaluation stays human-led.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Thank the sender for the outreach, state the proposal will be reviewed by the appropriate team, and avoid any commitment to partner, sponsor, or meet.

automation_scope: Acknowledge receipt only. Resolution stays with security or leadership.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Acknowledge the message, state that the matter has been forwarded to the appropriate team, and avoid any substantive decision or promise.

automation_scope: Auto for parking, shuttle, spa, cabana, and amenity basics when facts are known. Human review for event-specific access rules.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Provide the known facility or amenity answer directly. If event-specific rules may vary, state that the team will confirm current details.

automation_scope: Use AI for empathetic acknowledgement and escalation language. Human review should approve any service recovery response.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Acknowledge the concern, apologize for the experience, and explain that the appropriate guest services or leadership team will review and follow up.

automation_scope: Use a neutral acknowledgement and route for manual review.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Thank the sender, acknowledge the message, and state the correct team will review it if appropriate.

automation_scope: Auto-route to HR or employment verification contact.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Acknowledge the request and direct the sender to the HR or verification contact without disclosing employee information in the reply.

automation_scope: Use a neutral acknowledgement and route for manual review.
approved_ai_response_pattern: Thank the sender, acknowledge the message, and state the correct team will review it if appropriate.
